sentence_reviews.text: Quantization-aware training and low-precision adaptation expose a model to restricted numeric formats during optimization so deployment error is reduced.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Jacob arXiv abstract lines 41-42 proposes a quantization scheme for integer-only inference and co-designs a training procedure to preserve end-to-end model accuracy after quantization.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly supported for quantization-aware training and deployment accuracy.

sentence_reviews.text: combined with Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Jacob arXiv abstract lines 41-42 discusses quantization and integer/floating-point arithmetic for neural networks; tensors are implicit in neural-network parameters/activations rather than directly named.
sentence_reviews.notes: Numeric tensor operations are inherent but not explicit in the inspected abstract.

sentence_reviews.text: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors, Numerical analysis.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
